hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.ts || "$file" == *.tsx ]]; then npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | head -20; fi

MEMDIR=/Users/jbogaty/.claude/projects/-Users-jbogaty-src-arcade-cabinet-sim-soviet/memory && LOG=$MEMDIR/compact-log.md && cd /Users/jbogaty/src/arcade-cabinet/sim-soviet && echo '## Pre-Compact Snapshot' >> $LOG && date -Iseconds >> $LOG && echo '### Last 10 commits' >> $LOG && git log --oneline -10 >> $LOG && echo '### Uncommitted changes' >> $LOG && git diff --stat HEAD >> $LOG && echo '### Test status' >> $LOG && npx jest --no-coverage --silent 2>&1 | tail -3 >> $LOG && echo '### Branch' >> $LOG && git branch --show-current >> $LOG && echo '---' >> $LOG
